problem id: 1dba764b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHL(7)

examples:
  11100100 -> 00000000
  00100001 -> 00000000
  11001011 -> 00000000
  00010110 -> 00000000
  00111110 -> 00000000
  10111011 -> 10000000
  10000001 -> 00000000
  01010011 -> 10000000
  11011100 -> 00000000
  11010011 -> 10000000

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 10000000
